name: X-Golf Franklin
address: 209 S Royal Oaks Blvd #188, Franklin, TN 37064
about: X-Golf Franklin is an indoor golf simulator facility that offers accurate and realistic golf simulation experiences through advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and proprietary software. The venue features multiple simulator bays that accommodate up to six people per bay, with pricing structured per hour for simulator time. Its spacious layout includes seating, TVs, dart boards, and private simulator lounges, making it suitable for casual play, group events, and social gatherings. The facility also provides a full bar and restaurant service, adding to its appeal as a social destination for golfers and non-golfers alike.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology for accurate and realistic gameplay
Flexible pricing model accommodating groups up to 6 people per bay
On-site restaurant and bar for a complete social experience
Private simulator lounges available for exclusive events
PGA professional coaching services available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available; contact for full menu
Full bar service with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rental is available, but golfers are welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers its own restaurant and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For multiple players, it may take longer depending on group size and skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Franklin.
